releaseNotes: v0.25.2 — batched cleanup of small audit findings. Six low-risk fixes: conflict audit notes show LAST 8 device_id chars (SRE convention); _refreshRecallBannerSignature surfaces errors via debugPrint instead of silent catch-all; disconnect() clears lastSyncAt unconditionally so the old pharmacy's timestamp doesn't linger after a failed revoke; new test covers UpdateChecker.dispose() during in-flight requests; AppSettings.primeForTesting exposes the new banner-state fields; recalledVersions can now target a specific build (e.g. '0.24.22+81' matches only that build, '0.24.22' matches every build). 410 tests passing.
